title: Brimon Yarar
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Brimon Yarar |homeworld=[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Dark |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Dark |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Human League]] **[[Human League Heritage Squad]]s |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I am General Brimon Yarar. Welcome to our little project.|Brimon Yarar to Han Solo and his family|}} '''Brimon Yarar''' was a [[General/Legends|General]] in the [[Speciesism|anti-alien]] [[Human League]], and lead the group's [[Human League Heritage Squad|Heritage Squad]]s. ==Biography== {{Quote|The Drall planetary repulsor just came alive.''"''
''"''What?!''"''
''"''Just now, sir. The jamming is still in place, of course, so we can't get any more information. But our sensors just picked up a huge jolt of repulsor activity coming from Drall. Unfocused, uncontrolled, but it's there. The Drallists have got the thing working.|Brimon Yarar and Thrackan Sal-Solo|''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''}} Yarar was from the northern reaches of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia's]] main landmass. At some point after [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], he joined the Human League; an anti-alien extremist group founded by [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], a former member of Corellia's [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] government. By [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], he had risen to the rank of General and oversaw a large excavating operation on the planet by the League's Heritage Squads, under the guise of a simple archeological dig to learn about early [[Human/Legends|human]] history on Corellia — its actual purpose being to uncover an ancient underground [[Planetary repulsor|repulsor]]. He gave a tour of the dig site to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her [[Solo family|family]], during which [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]], and [[Anakin Solo]] broke away from the tour and found the repulsor, but decided not to tell the General, having seen through his friendly facade. Later on, after the Human League began an [[Corellian Crisis|insurrection]] to take control of the entire [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]], Yarar informed Sal-Solo of [[Drall (planet)|Drall's]] repulsor being activated, incorrectly believing the [[Drallist Front]] had done it. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Do you want that General What'shisname—''"''
''"''Yarar.''"''
''"''Right, Yarar. He's no nice guy, no matter how hard he smiles.|Jacen Solo and [[Q9-X2]]|}} Yarar was a middle-aged, slightly larger [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Gender/Legends|man]] with dark skin, short dark hair, and a toothy smile. He held anti-[[Alien/Legends|alien]] sentiments to the point that he refused to even acknowledge the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and the [[Drall/Legends|Drall]] [[Ebrihim]] when they accompanied the Solo family on their tour of Corellia's planetary repulsor digsite. He had a soft voice which contained a slight accent from the northern regions of Corellia's main landmass. ==Equipment== Yarar wore a dark [[Color/Legends|brown]] uniform of a severe cut, a hat, and metal-toed black boots, as did the rest of the Human League's members, though minus the group's armband. His hat was slightly more elaborate than those worn by lower-ranking members, and an elaborate insignia designating his rank of General was pinned to his tunic's shoulder boards. ==Appearances== *''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Brimon Yarar }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yarar, Brimon}} [[Category:Corellians]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
